data.description: Consumer Tech News (March 23-27): Netflix & Sony Hikes Prices, OpenAI Flags Microsoft Dependency Risk & More

data.title: Goodbaby International 2025 Revenue Reaches Approximately HK$8,659.2 Million
data.description: In the midst of a challenging global environment, CYBEX achieved significant success by breaking its own records for revenue and profit. The company saw a notable 13.0% increase in revenue, reaching around HK$5,047.4 million. This growth was supported by the strong performance of Evenflo within the sector. These achievements highlight CYBEX's ability to gain market share and thrive amidst turbulent conditions.

data.title: Pharos Network and Circle to Bring USDC and CCTP to Upcoming Mainnet, Powering a RealFi Settlement Layer
data.description: Today, in Hong Kong, Pharos Network, a prominent Layer-1 blockchain platform, revealed that the widely-used stablecoin USDC and Circle Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) will be implemented on Pharos Mainnet in The Pacific Ocean. This move aims to enhance stablecoin settlement processes and facilitate smooth cross-chain capital transfer.

data.title: Apple Self Storage Guelph Achieves Zero Carbon Building-Design Certification
data.description: Apple Self Storage in Guelph, Ontario has recently made history by becoming the first self storage facility in the province to receive the prestigious Zero Carbon Building-Design certification from the Canada Green Building Council. This accomplishment marks a significant milestone in the industry, showcasing the facility's commitment to environmental sustainability. This certification reflects the facility's adherence to strict standards aimed at reducing carbon emissions and promoting eco-friendly practices. By achieving this designation, Apple Self Storage has set a notable example for others in the sector.

data.title: DOT Reinforces SAP Gatekeeper Role Amid Rising Industry Risks
data.description: ASAP cautions both employers and employees about the potential risks associated with websites promoting fast, guaranteed, or inexpensive RTD programs. The warning was issued in Baltimore on March 28, 2026. ASAP has raised concerns about fraudulent SAP practices posing a threat to public safety. It has been noted that some employers do not regularly verify a SAP's credentials, heightening the risk of falling victim to such schemes. It is essential for all parties involved to exercise vigilance and scrutinize any programs claiming unusual benefits or low costs.

data.title: Lummis advocates for developer protections in the CLARITY Act, overlooked amid focus on stablecoin yield - crypto lawyer.
data.description: Jake Chervinsky, a lawyer specializing in cryptocurrency, highlighted that current legislation concerning protections for crypto developers has not received much attention due to the significant emphasis on stablecoin yield within the CLARITY Act. The focus on stablecoin yield has diverted attention from key issues related to developer safeguards within the crypto industry.

data.title: P2P.me team regrets betting on own $6M fundraising outcome on Polymarket prediction platform.
data.description: The team at P2P.me has initiated bets on the Polymarket prediction platform regarding whether the project will reach its fundraising target of $6 million.

data.title: Leading Eye Insurance Plans (2026): VSP Individual Vision Plans Recognized for Nationwide Eye Doctor Network by Better Business Advice
data.description: On March 29, 2026, Better Business Advice acknowledged VSP Individual Vision Plans for its top-tier eye insurance offerings, praising its extensive network of eye care providers across the nation and comprehensive coverage including eye exams, eyewear, and lens enhancements. The recognition highlights the company's commitment to providing quality vision care to its customers.

data.title: Iran conflict may prompt countries to reduce reliance on natural gas. U.S. among exporters set to benefit. Gas-buying nations exploring coal, solar, and nuclear options.
data.description: Gas-buying countries are exploring alternative energy sources like coal, solar, and nuclear energy as disruptions to Persian Gulf supplies loom. The United States and other exporters stand to benefit from this shift.

data.title: Experienced industry vet Steve Cahillane backed out of breaking up Kraft Heinz, aims to revive company with popular brands.
data.description: Food industry veteran Steve Cahillane is leading efforts to revitalize the company responsible for iconic brands such as Kool-Aid and Oscar Mayer. With a wealth of experience in the industry, Cahillane aims to bring these beloved brands back to prominence in the market.

data.title: Tech backlash at schools: Chromebooks banned, no more YouTube or games. Some students prefer offline learning, opting for textbooks and pencils.
data.description: School laptops will no longer have access to YouTube or video games, instead, students will be using textbooks and pencils for learning. Seventh graders have expressed a preference for offline learning.

data.title: BNP Paribas introduces six Bitcoin and Ether ETNs for retail customers in France, part of wider crypto adoption trend in Europe. UK also lifts retail access ban.
data.description: The popularity of Crypto Exchange-Traded Notes (ETNs) is increasing in Europe, with banks expanding their offerings. In the UK, retail access has been reinstated following the lifting of the ban, showing a growing trend. This indicates a positive shift towards cryptocurrency adoption in the region.

data.title: Inside China's wildest cave basketball court
data.description: On March 29, 2026, in Beijing, a recent news report highlighted the remarkable karst caves located in Guizhou province. These caves, formed over millions of years, are known for their stunning beauty and unique acoustics. Many of these natural wonders offer stable conditions, making them ideal for exploration. The caves beneath the majestic mountains in Guizhou province exemplify nature's awe-inspiring creations, drawing in visitors from afar to witness their splendor.

data.title: Air Canada crash at LaGuardia caused by chain of events, worst runway disaster in decades. Frantic call to 'Stop, Stop, Stop'.
data.description: A series of seemingly insignificant incidents culminated in the most severe runway disaster at LaGuardia Airport in many years.

data.title: Concerns arise as future US gov't may regulate crypto with unclear rules. The CLARITY Act remains in Senate limbo over disagreements on stablecoin yields.
data.description: The progress of the CLARITY Act has hit a roadblock in the Senate as discussions between banks, cryptocurrency firms, and legislators have come to a standstill. Disagreements on crucial components such as the inclusion of stablecoin yields have prevented a resolution. This impasse has led to delays in moving forward with the legislation, which is aimed at addressing regulatory concerns in the financial and digital asset sectors. The Act, which holds significant importance for the industry, remains in limbo as negotiations continue amidst mounting pressure.

data.title: Novartis IgAN data in New England Journal of Medicine show Fabhalta® slowed kidney function decline by 49.3%
data.description: Novartis revealed the final two-year findings from the Phase III APPLAUSE-IgAN study of Fabhalta ® (iptacopan) in IgA nephropathy (IgAN) on March 29, 2026. The study showcased that Fabhalta exhibited a notable enhancement in estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) slope, a vital indicator of kidney function, in contrast to the placebo. Over the course of two years, Fabhalta consistently surpassed the placebo in various important kidney outcomes, indicating a slowdown in the progression of the disease and a potential preservation of kidney function in IgAN. These results were disseminated in the New England Journal of Medicine and shared as late-breaking information at the 2026 World Congress of Nephrology (WCN).

data.title: Canada suggests banning crypto donations to prevent foreign interference; a prior bill in 2024 failed to pass, leading to its demise.
data.description: A bill with similar provisions was put forward in 2024, but it did not progress beyond the second reading in the House of Commons. Unfortunately, the bill failed to become law and was ultimately abandoned.

data.title: Tamarack Resort Hosts Two Weekends of High-Energy RMSHA Races
data.description: Tamarack Resort in TAMARACK, Idaho, hosted the Rocky Mountain States Hill Climb Association (RMSHA) competition over two weekends in March 2026. The event featured elite snowmobile athletes showcasing their skills on the mountain. Spectators had the opportunity to view the action from lift-served viewing areas, providing an immersive experience. The event attracted a significant number of participants and attendees, contributing to the resort's vibrant winter sports atmosphere.

data.title: REPATHA® CUTS RISK OF FIRST MAJOR CARDIOVASCULAR EVENTS BY 31% IN HIGH-RISK PATIENTS WITHOUT KNOWN SIGNIFICANT ATHEROSCLEROSIS
data.description: In a recent study, Repatha stands out as the sole PCSK9 Inhibitor that notably diminishes the likelihood of initial cardiovascular events. The VESALIUS-CV subgroup highlights the advantages of starting Repatha sooner in high-risk individuals, resulting in a median reduction of 44 mg/dL in LDL-C levels. These findings underscore the importance of early intervention with Repatha for high-risk patients.

data.title: Washington AG sues Kalshi, claiming prediction markets broke state laws. Another legal woe for the company.
data.description: On Friday, the Attorney General of Washington filed a lawsuit against Kalshi, accusing the prediction markets platform of breaching state regulations. This legal action adds to the growing number of states challenging Kalshi's operations.
